articles.title: Mass. man sentenced for illegally trafficking dozens of endangered animal parts
articles.description:
The man imported the parts from dealers in Cameroon and Indonesia, who would hunt and kill the animals he requested.

The post Mass. man sentenced for illegally trafficking dozens of endangered animal parts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts man sentenced for trafficking endangered animal parts from Cameroon and Indonesia.
He imported dozens of parts, contributing to the decline of endangered species.
Local wildlife advocates emphasize the need for stricter enforcement against illegal trafficking.
